142700.name: Daily new confirmed cases due to COVID-19 (rolling 7-day average, right-aligned)

display.entityAnnotationsMap:
European Union: Some EU countries changed methodology. See country-by-country series.
Spain: Apr 19: methodology change & Apr 25: methodology change
Ecuador: May 8: methodology change
France: Jun 2: methodology change
Chile: Jun 18: earlier cases added
United Kingdom: Jul 3: methodology change & Oct 5: earlier cases added
Kyrgyzstan: Jul 18: methodology change
Luxembourg: Aug 28: methodology change

142700.s_name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 5 October, 10:36 (London time)

source.name: European CDC – Situation Update Worldwide – Last updated 5 October, 10:36 (London time)
source.dataPublishedBy: European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC)
source.additionalInfo: Raw data on confirmed cases and deaths for all countries is sourced from the European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC). Our complete COVID-19 dataset is a collection of the COVID-19 data maintained by Our World in Data. It is updated daily and includes data on confirmed cases, deaths, and testing. We have created a new description of all our data sources. You find it at our GitHub repository here. There you can download all of our data.

142923.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (ICL, mean)
142923.description: Values are for the mean estimate.

source.name: Imperial College London, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)
source.dataPublishedBy: MRC Centre for Global Infectious Disease Analysis, Imperial College London
source.additionalInfo: Data from Imperial College London (ICL) estimating the true number of COVID-19 infections for currently 164 countries and territories. Estimates and countries covered are as of 25 September 2020. More details can be found at https://mrc-ide.github.io/global-lmic-reports/.

142942.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (IHME, mean)
142942.description: Values are for the mean estimate.
142942.s_name: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)

source.name: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)
source.dataPublishedBy: Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation
source.additionalInfo: Data from the Institute for Health Metrics and Evaluation (IHME) estimating the true number of COVID-19 infections for currently 167 countries and territories. Estimates and regions covered are as of 24 September 2020. More details can be found at http://www.healthdata.org/covid.

142948.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (YYG, mean)
142948.description: Values are for the mean estimate.

source.name: Youyang Gu, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)
source.additionalInfo: Data from Youyang Gu estimating the true number of COVID-19 infections for currently 71 countries. Estimates and countries covered are as of 3 October 2020. More details can be found at https://covid19-projections.com/.

143510.name: Daily new estimated infections of COVID-19 (LSHTM, median)
143510.description: Values are for the median estimate.
143510.s_name: London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)

source.name: London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine, COVID-19 Estimates (2020)
source.dataPublishedBy: The Centre for Mathematical Modelling of Infectious Diseases, London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine
source.additionalInfo:
Data from the London School of Hygiene & Tropical Medicine (LSHTM) estimating the ascertainment rate of symptomatic COVID-19 infections for currently 161 countries and territories. Estimates and regions covered are as of 25 August 2020. More details can be found at https://cmmid.github.io/topics/covid19/global_cfr_estimates.html.

In accordance with the LSHTM researchers' methodology, we calculate the true number of infections by using estimates of the ascertainment rate and of the percentage of asymptomatic infections to adjust the confirmed cases data as reported by the European Centre for Disease Prevention and Control (ECDC).
